description: A commercial entitlement record describing what an operator is allowed to run and govern.

context_schema.runtime_roles: string[] — runtime roles allowed under this entitlement
context_schema.required_entitlements: string[] — entitlements required for this profile
context_schema.operator: object — verified operator identity and derived entitlements used to authorize the operation
context_schema.branding_scope: string[] — branding or white-label surfaces in scope
context_schema.downstream_customer: string? — downstream customer name or reference

ui.label: Entitlement
ui.description: Commercial entitlement record owned by Ophan.
